content.problemStatement:
A knockout tournament is a type of elimination tournament where the loser of each match-up is immediately eliminated from the tournament. The following image showcases a knockout tournament between 161616 players.

In the tournament:


Initially, the 161616 players are paired into 888 matches in the first round.
The winners of these 888 matches proceed to the next round, while the losers are eliminated.
The 888 winners from the first round are paired into 444 matches.
The 444 winners from the quarterfinals are paired into 222 matches.
The 222 winners from the semifinals compete in the final match to determine the champion.
A knockout tennis tournament is organised in Chefland. There are 161616 players, and the ithi^{th}ith player has a skill level of SiS_iSi‚Äč. It is guaranteed that all skill levels are **distinct**, that is, Si‚Č†SjS_i \neq S_jSi‚ÄčÓÄ†=Sj‚Äč for i‚Č†ji \neq jiÓÄ†=j.

It is known that in a match between two players, the player with higher skill level **always wins**.

For each player iii, find the **maximum** number of matches the player can win in the tournament if the initial pairings are made optimally.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The only line of each test case contains 161616 space-separated integers S1,S2,‚Ä¶,S16S_1, S_2, \ldots, S_{16}S1‚Äč,S2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,S16‚Äč, denoting the skill levels of the players.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line 161616 space-separated integers.

The ithi^{th}ith integer should be the **maximum** number of matches player iii can win in the tournament if initial pairings are made optimally.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Player 333 has maximum skill (36)(36)(36) and thus, he will win all 444 matches irrespective of the pairings. Similarly player 888 has the minimum skill (2)(2)(2) and thus, he will win 000 matches.

Player 111 with skill level 222222 can win a maximum of 333 matches. Consider the pairings of skill:

Round 111: (22,18),(16,4),(2,20),(5,10)(22, 18), (16, 4), (2, 20), (5, 10)(22,18),(16,4),(2,20),(5,10); the winners of this round would be 22,16,20,1022, 16, 20, 1022,16,20,10. The remaining 888 players can be paired in any way in this round.
Round 222: (22,16),(20,10)(22, 16), (20, 10)(22,16),(20,10); the winners of this round would be 22,2022, 2022,20. There are two other matches in this round, their outcomes do not matter to us.
Round 333: (22,20)(22, 20)(22,20); the winner of this round would be 222222. There is one other match in this round.
Round 444: The final will be between (22,36)(22, 36)(22,36), since the player with skill 363636 has the maximum skill and so would have won all previous rounds.
In the final match, player 111 will lose.


Player 151515 with skill level 101010 can win a maximum of 222 matches. Consider the pairings of skill:

Round 111: (4,2),(5,10)(4, 2), (5, 10)(4,2),(5,10); the winners of this round would be 4,104, 104,10. The remaining players can be paired in any way in this round.
Round 222: (4,10)(4, 10)(4,10); the winner of this round would be 101010. The outcomes of the other matches don't matter much.
It can be shown that the player with skill 101010 cannot win any more matches - no matter how the other pairings are made, in the third round they will face someone with higher skill.


Player 131313 with skill level 555 can win a maximum of 111 match. Consider the pairings of skill:

Round 111: (2,5)(2, 5)(2,5); the winner of this match would be 555. The remaining players can be paired in any way in this round.
It can be shown that the player with skill 555 cannot win any more matches.
